title: zendesk-qa-playbooks
pitch: Generate consistent Zendesk email replies and QA checklists from reusable playbook templates.
keyFeatures: YAML/JSON playbook format for reply templates and QA criteria
Rule-based routing by ticket tags, language, and intent
Export to Zendesk macros plus printable QA checklists
targetUsers: Support engineering teams and ops-minded CS leads who want consistent Zendesk email quality at scale.
